title: Packages
subtitle: GoPDF.js is a layered monorepo. This repository ships @gopdfjs/* npm packages only — not gopdf-cli.

engine.name: @gopdfjs/engine
engine.description: Public consumer API — createEngine(adapter) exposes compressPdf, repairPdf, and other tool methods.

adapters.name: Adapters
adapters.description: adapter-browser and adapter-node wire WASM, Workers, and host I/O into a GopdfAdapter.

plugins.name: @gopdfjs/plugin-*
plugins.description: Domain logic (shrink, extract, repair, …) consumed by the engine — not imported directly by apps.
plugins.import: // wired inside createEngine — apps use engine.*()

wasm.name: @gopdfjs/wasm
wasm.description: wasm-pack output from crates/gopdf-*; initialized by adapters, never imported by product UI code.

note: Terminal users install gopdf-cli from the separate gopdf-cli repository.
